summary.what: Add unit tests for pickBatchAnchor mixed-topology cases (v0.22.2 post-hoc review gap)
summary.why: Reviewer flagged the regression risk: pickBatchAnchor was added to fix Laura's case but had no test exercising the actual mixed-branch scenario. A future change that broke topology selection would have been silent
summary.how: Refactored to expose pickBatchAnchorWith as pure-function variant with injected isOnFirstParent predicate. New test covers 7 cases including Laura's exact pathology (newest commit on side branch, older on first-parent line — fix returns the older local commit, not commits[0])
